nasb.text: And behold, as Barak pursued Sisera, Jael came out to meet him and said to him, “Come, and I will show you the man whom you are seeking.” And he entered with her, and behold Sisera was lying dead with the tent peg in his temple.

esv.text: And behold, as Barak was pursuing Sisera, Jael went out to meet him and said to him, “Come, and I will show you the man whom you are seeking.” So he went in to her tent, and there lay Sisera dead, with the tent peg in his temple.

cnv.text: 那時，巴拉追趕西西拉，雅億出來迎接他，對他說：“來吧，我給你看你尋找的人。”他就進到她那裡去；看見西西拉已經仆倒，死了；橛子還在他的太陽穴裡。

ccb.text: 巴拉追来了，雅亿出来迎接他，对他说：“你找的人在这里，进来看看吧。”巴拉和她进了帐篷，见西西拉死在那里，太阳穴上还插着橛子。
